root.sql:
SELECT sc_fin_send_tax_dep.tax_date , sc_fin_send_tax_dep.tax_seq , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card as id_card , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as member_name , sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no || ' ' || sc_mem_m_member_address.road || ' ' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_sub_district_name ( sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol ) || ' ' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_district_name ( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code , sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code ) || ' ' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_province_name ( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code ) || ' ' || sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode as address_pres , coalesce( ( sc_fin_send_tax_dep.paid_amount ),0) as interest_paid , coalesce( ( sc_fin_send_tax_dep.tax_amount ),0) as tax_paid , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ( coalesce( ( sc_fin_send_tax_dep.tax_amount ) , 0) ) as thai_tax_paid
, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no as membership_no
FROM sc_fin_send_tax_dep, sc_dep_m_creditor, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_member_address WHERE ( sc_fin_send_tax_dep.deposit_account_no = sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no ) and ( sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no ) and ( sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( ( sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '1' ) ) /*WHERE*/ -- and sc_fin_send_tax_dep.tax_date >= '1/3/2024'
order by sc_fin_send_tax_dep.tax_date , sc_fin_send_tax_dep.tax_seq
